title: How to develop a integration connect to linkedin to get accesstoken?
excerpt: How to develop a integration connect to linkedin to get access token, after use access token to call api post to linkedin? I writed a api to auto post to linkedin and need use integation to connect to linkedin. Please he…

posts.author: minhtri (Le Minh Tri)
posts.cookedHtml: How to develop a integration connect to linkedin to get access token, after use access token to call api post to linkedin? I writed a api to auto post to linkedin and need use integation to connect to linkedin. Please help me solution. Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @minhtri and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I am not sure I understand the question.

You want to create an integration to connect monday to Linkedin.

To get a token to get data from monday/update data in monday you can follow this article it describes the different ways in which you can get a token for an app to interact with monday via API.

Regarding how to get a token from Linkedin to interact with that platform, that is something you will need to ask Linkedin´s team as I am not sure how that works in this other platform.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: @minhtri have you tried Zapier or Make?

posts.author: minhtri (Le Minh Tri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday , @andres-at-connex
I developed a integration app to authentication with Linkedin success. Thanks every one support.
